title: Fix compilation error causing production deployment failure

requirements.summary: Verify that the Add Customer and Add Cattle form submission bug fixes are preserved and working correctly after the compilation fix
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the Add Customer form successfully calls the backend mutation and updates the customer list without a full page reload
Submitting the Add Cattle form successfully calls the backend mutation and updates the cattle list without a full page reload
No double-submission occurs due to the existing ref-based guard in CattleForm and CustomerForm

file_operations.description: Review and verify the ref-based double-submission guard is correctly implemented and working. Ensure the form submission calls the backend mutation via useAddCattle or useUpdateCattle and that the mutation invalidates the cattle query cache to trigger UI updates without a page reload.

Review and verify the ref-based double-submission guard is correctly implemented and working. Ensure the form submission calls the backend mutation via useAddCustomer or useUpdateCustomer and that the mutation invalidates the customer query cache to trigger UI updates without a page reload.

Verify that useAddCattle and useAddCustomer mutations correctly invalidate their respective query keys ('cattle' and 'customers') on success to ensure the UI updates automatically after form submission without requiring a page reload.

Verify that the CattleForm component is correctly wired to useAddCattle and useUpdateCattle mutations, and that successful submissions close the dialog and refresh the cattle list via query invalidation.

Verify that the CustomerForm component is correctly wired to useAddCustomer and useUpdateCustomer mutations, and that successful submissions close the dialog and refresh the customer list via query invalidation.
